title: Badgers women remain winless
description: GEORGE NEWS - The hourglass is starting to...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The hourglass is starting to run out for the Garden Route Badgers women's team in their aspirations to remain in the top tier of South African women's cricket.

The Badgers women, who travelled to Durban the past weekend for a series of matches in the Hollywoodbets Pro series against the Dolphins, suffered defeats in both the Pro50 and Pro20 series against strong opposition.

In the Pro50 match that was played at Chatworth, the Badgers only managed to score 66 (all out) whereafter the Dolphins posted the winning total (68/4) in the 17th over.


> In the Pro50 match at the same venue on Sunday, the home side – after being put in to bat – scored a competitive 143/4 and thereafter restricted the Badgers to 89/6 for a 54 runs bonus point defeat.


The Badgers will be under huge pressure for their next round of matches in the competition against Free State in Bloemfontein on 30 November and1 December.

The summarised score cards are:

Pro50 Series

Garden Route Badgers 66 all out – 33.5 overs (Mochelle May 11, Nobulumko Baneti 2/11, Nonkululeko Mlaba 3/5, Jade de Figueiredo 2/4)

Dolphins 68/4 - 16.2 overs (Alexandra Candler 36, Jané Winster 2/7)

Dolphins won by 6 wickets.

Pro20 Series

Dolphins 143/4 - 20 overs (Alexandra Candler 52, Nicole de Klerk 68, Khayakaze Mathe 2/20)

Garden Route Badgers 89/6 – 20 overs (Annerie Dercksen 29, Jana Nel 25)

Dolphins won by 54 runs.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
